note: Set the Image (file) property on each page to image_file, and overwrite Alt text with alt_text. Status stays Draft — human approval gate unchanged.

posts.row_name: Asia grows half the world's potatoes
posts.alt_text: Freshly harvested potatoes above the headline 'Asia grows nearly half the world's potatoes' with a large 46% figure. Source: FAOSTAT 2024.

posts.row_name: Belarus eats the most per capita
posts.alt_text: Potatoes with a bar chart of per-capita potato consumption — Belarus 181 kg, Ukraine 136, Russia 111, China 41. Source: FAOSTAT.

posts.row_name: Idaho = one third of US production
posts.alt_text: Potato harvester beside the headline 'One state grows a third of America's potatoes' and a 32% figure for Idaho. Source: USDA NASS.
Potatoes with the headline 'Can diabetics eat potatoes?' and a 25–35% figure on cooling potatoes lowering glycemic response.
Potato planting with the headline on Pakistan being a fast-rising producer and a +186% growth figure. Source: FAOSTAT.

posts.row_name: How big is the global potato market
posts.alt_text: Potatoes with the headline 'How big is the global potato business?' and tags Fresh, Frozen, Dried, Processed. Sources: FAOSTAT, UN Comtrade.

posts.row_name: Waxy vs floury: types of potatoes
posts.alt_text: Colourful potato varieties with a waxy vs floury vs all-purpose comparison.

posts.row_name: How long potatoes last in cold storage
posts.alt_text: Potatoes with the headline on potato shelf life and two figures: 3–5 weeks in the pantry, 4–8 months in cold storage.
Potato harvester with the headline 'India's potato heartland is Uttar Pradesh' and 57.05M tonnes making India the #2 producer. Sources: FAOSTAT, DA&FW.
Potato flakes with the headline 'Most potatoes never reach a kitchen whole' and tags Fries, Chips, Starch, Flour, Vodka.

posts.row_name: Which country eats the most chips
posts.alt_text: French fries with the headline 'Who eats the most potato chips?' — most by volume: United States; most per person: UK, Ireland, Australia.

posts.row_name: Are potatoes good for heart health
posts.alt_text: Potatoes with the headline 'Are potatoes good for your heart?' and a 620 mg potassium figure — more than a banana.
Potato harvest with the headline 'Climate change is rewriting where potatoes grow' and three points on heat stress, breeding, and shifting zones. Source: CIP, FAO.

posts.row_name: When is it too late to plant potatoes
posts.alt_text: Potato planting with the headline 'When is it too late to plant potatoes?' and guidance to count back days-to-maturity from first frost.
Native Andean potatoes with the headline 'Every potato traces back to the Andes' and Peru's ~85 kg per-capita figure. Sources: CIP, FAOSTAT.
